9.reason: [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it may cause buffer overflow. More critically, in many modern environments, 'gets' is not available, leading to a compilation error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers due to security risks. Should use 'fgets' instead.]

61.reason: [If the input is "0.0001", then after skipping zeros, k becomes 5 (beyond string length), leading to undefined behavior. Also, 'res' may not be null-terminated, causing 'fputs' to print garbage.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If the input is "0.0001", then after skipping zeros, k becomes 5 (beyond string length), leading to undefined behavior. Also, 'res' may not be null-terminated, causing 'fputs' to print garbage.]
